name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate senior SDE interview scripts with in-chat Excalidraw previews and transparent hand-drawn frames.

interface.longDescription: Turn technical interview excerpts into Chinese-first senior SDE speaking scripts, then show a Chinese-handwritten Excalidraw preview directly in chat with transparent frames and blue decision-flow outlines.
defaultPrompt: Create a senior SDE answer and show a Chinese-handwritten Excalidraw preview in chat.
Turn this excerpt into a 90-120 second interview answer.
Draw an Excalidraw card with a blue decision flow.
